title: mcp verb + time-travel debugging tools
manager: An `mcp` verb exposing FSL to AI agents, plus time-travel debugging tools — state_at, why_rejected, val_history, diverges_from — that let you interrogate a recorded run at any point. This is the debugging payoff of deterministic replay: because every run is reproducible, you can step backward, ask why a transition was rejected, or find exactly where two runs diverged — all impossible with a normal live-only debugger that only knows the present.
cs: `mcp` verb (agent interface) + time-travel tools (state_at/why_rejected/val_history/diverges_from) over recorded runs; the replay-powered debugger.
